description: Hero section layout patterns for business websites. Each pattern defines structure, visual approach, and recommended components.

patterns.name: Full-Width Image Background
patterns.description: Full-bleed background image with dark overlay and centered white text. High visual impact, best when business has strong photography.

structure.content: relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center text-white px-4

patterns.notes: Use the business's best photo. Overlay opacity 40-60% depending on image brightness.

patterns.name: Split Layout
patterns.description: Text content on left, image on right (or vice versa). Clean, professional look. Good for services that need explanation.

structure.text_side: flex flex-col justify-center px-8 md:px-16 py-12

patterns.notes: Text side should have ample whitespace. Image side can use object-cover for full bleed.

patterns.name: Centered Text with Gradient
patterns.description: Centered headline with animated gradient background. Modern, tech-forward aesthetic. No image dependency.

structure.container: relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-4
structure.background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 via-background to-secondary/20

patterns.notes: Works well without photos. Add subtle animation for visual interest.

patterns.name: Video Background
patterns.description: Looping background video with text overlay. Maximum visual impact for businesses with video content.

structure.content: relative z-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full text-white text-center px-4

patterns.notes: Video should be short (10-15s), muted, and autoplay. Provide fallback image for mobile.

patterns.name: Animated Text Hero
patterns.description: Focus on animated text effects — typewriter, generate, or sparkle animations. Minimal but eye-catching.

structure.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-4 bg-background

patterns.notes: Choose one text animation effect — don't combine multiple. Keep animation duration under 3 seconds.

patterns.name: Hero with Card Grid
patterns.description: Headline above a grid of 3-4 service cards. Immediately shows what the business offers.

structure.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 max-w-6xl mx-auto

patterns.notes: Each card should have an icon, title, and short description. 3 cards works best for balance.

patterns.name: Hero Parallax
patterns.description: Multiple images floating with parallax scroll effect. Creates depth and showcases multiple photos.
patterns.notes: Needs 5-10 good photos. Very impressive but heavy — consider lazy loading.

patterns.name: Minimal with Social Proof
patterns.description: Clean minimal hero with headline, then a row of trust indicators (rating, review count, years in business).

structure.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen px-4 bg-background

patterns.notes: Social proof row should show 3-4 metrics. Use real data from Google Places API.

patterns.name: Sticky Scroll Hero
patterns.description: Left side stays fixed with business info while right side scrolls through content sections. Immersive storytelling.

structure.sticky_side: md:sticky md:top-0 md:h-screen flex flex-col justify-center px-8 md:px-16

patterns.notes: Right side should have 3-5 distinct content blocks. Each block tells part of the business story.

patterns.name: Bento Hero
patterns.description: Asymmetric bento grid layout combining headline, images, stats, and CTAs in a dynamic grid.

structure.grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 max-w-6xl mx-auto auto-rows-[200px]

patterns.notes: Hero cell should span 2 columns. Mix content types for visual variety. Keep to 6-8 cells max.
